name: Nankai Tatsumura Construction Co., Ltd.
summary: Nankai Tatsumura Construction Co., Ltd. operates as a construction company in Japan. The company undertakes civil engineering, construction, pipe, electrical, and telecommunications construction works, as well as general construction works. It also owns and sells real estate properties. The company was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. Nankai Tatsumura Construction Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Nankai Electric Railway Co., Ltd.
